name: Regulated Enterprise (DACH)
description: Large enterprises in financial services, insurance, and critical infrastructure with 1,000+ employees in DACH requiring sovereign cloud and compliance-driven IT modernization.

tam.description: European managed cloud services in regulated industries
tam.source: LLM estimate based on ISG, Gartner 2025 European cloud services sizing for regulated verticals

sam.description: DACH regulated enterprise managed cloud and sovereign infrastructure
sam.source: LLM estimate: ~15% of EU TAM attributable to DACH regulated segments (financial services, insurance, KRITIS)

som.description: 80 enterprise accounts x EUR 4M average ACV over 3 years
som.source: Bottom-up estimate: T-Systems has ~200 large regulated accounts, targeting 40% active cloud engagement at EUR 4M blended ACV
